# Git Push Summary

## Stage
- Stage name: `<stage-name>`
- Goal: `<what this stage intended to deliver>`

## What Changed
- Files touched: `<count and key paths>`
- Key behavior updates:
  - `<change-1>`
  - `<change-2>`
- Non-functional updates (docs/tests/tooling):
  - `<item>`

## Validation
- Secret safety check: `<pass/fail + command>`
- Quality checks run:
  - `<check-name>: <pass/fail>`
  - `<check-name>: <pass/fail>`

## Risk Review
- Forbidden secret-like values detected: `<no/yes + details>`
- Breaking change risk: `<low/medium/high + reason>`
- Rollback note: `<how to revert this stage if needed>`

## Proposed Commit
- Commit title: `<commit-title>`
- Commit message body:
  - `<line-1>`
  - `<line-2>`

## Push Request
- Target branch: `<branch>`
- Remote: `<remote>`
- Request: confirm push approval.
- say "AUTHOURISE" to push to git
